CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Deal_Team_Identified__c ) = 'Have not identified team and committed to their availability',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Deal_Team_Identified__c ) = 'Have team identified and available',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Deal_Team_Identified__c ) = 'Have a proven marketing manager and some team members available and committed',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Deal_Team_Identified__c ) = 'Have a proven marketing manager and a team available and committed',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Deal_Team_Identified
